title: Way to the Other Worlds
description: This mod is the mod based on the new dimensions, bosses and weapons. It was made before my main mod called Eternal Tales and became a base for it
body:
This mod was cancelled and remade as a new mod called Eternal Tales

 You can download this mod if you interested in how the old Eternal Tales was looking like or if you want to play on 1.12.2

 

Subscribe on mod's platforms:

Discord Server

YouTube

Telegram channel

Wiki

VK (Russian) 



Way to the Other Worlds based on new worlds. It also adds a lot of other content.

I advise you to download a mod that shows crafts, because I will not show them.

What adds the mod:
118 blocks, 264 items, 8 types of armor and several boots, 3 biomes, 42 mobs? 19 types of food, 59 tools (with swords), 26 types of firearms and much more ...
Some of the items have animation!

Normal World:
Return Ticket - can return you from absolutely any dimension to the overworld. Drops from many creatures of other worlds, and can also be made from a map and flisotuachewn.
Dark Upgrade Kit - Improves some weapons. Drops out of the dark.
Plates - used for crafting mechanisms. There are stone, iron, gold, luxtarr, aquatura, diamond, darkham, lapis lazuli, flisotuachewn and obsidian plates.
The cleansing, crystallizing, melting, crushing and grinding core are used to create mechanisms.
Cup and basalt Cup.
Cup of lava.
The acid cup is a basalt mug + water + uranium.
Experience booster - increases the experience level (namely the level) of the player by 2. Drops from some mobs.

 

Ores:
Luxtarr is ore, the objects of which are slightly weaker than diamond.
Darkham is a little better than diamond.
Water - ore generated only in the biome of the ocean or river. The easiest way to get it from the mountains near the ocean. It rarely appears in rivers due to the narrow biome.
Flisotuachewn - Ore that does not have armor and tools is used in many craft. Also used as pink dye.
Uranium - mined only in the volcanic valley. When uranium is in the inventory, the effect of radiation is superimposed.
Ruby - things from it are better than diamond.

Other materials:
Rusty Ingot - Drop from Rusty Golem.
Ice Crystal Drop from Bows. From it you can make a sword.
Taiga Crystal - Drop from the Ekatebrina boss. From it you can make a sword that imposes slowness.
Graphite - Made in an alchemical furnace of six coal. It can be used as fuel.

Various swords and tools not from ores:
Dirtus' sword - poison. Drops from Wild Creeper.
Ryusuke Sword - sets fire to effect and glows. Drops from Hot Savahha.

Structures:
Birch castle is a structure that appears on the plains and in the forest. It has several useful items.
Spruce castle - an alternative version of the birch castle, only in the taiga.
Lost statue - a structure in the desert.
Spring - A structure that is perhaps imperceptible, as it consists of an ordinary tree and water below it generated by a spring. The only difference is the large number of flowers around the tree. A spring block can generate water forever.

Mobs (life, damage, resistance to something (if any), appearance biomes, drop (b - bronze coin, c - silver, z-gold)):
Super dude - 40, 8, -, Warm, earthen biomes. 1s
Arkenian - 80, 4. Arrows, fall, cactus. Warm biomes. 2b
Fake Chicken - 20, 8. Fire, lightning, potions, cactus. Plains, forest, taiga. Roasted chicken, 3b, feather.
Reinforced zombies - 50, 10, -, plains, forests, deserts. Dirtus sword, rotten flesh 4, orange dye, 3b, 1s.
Wild Creeper - 40, 10. Fire, Lightning. Jungle. Ryusuke's Sword, Creeper Head, Gunpowder 2, charcoal 2, 2b, 1 s.
Bowes - 40, 10, -, cold biomes. Ice crystal 2, ice 3, comet stone, snowball 2, coldest, 1s, 3b.
Rusty Golem - 60, 10, -, warm biomes. Rusty Ingot, 3b, Energy Bullet 10.
Halfworlder - 100, 10. Arrows, fall, cactus. Warm biomes. Rocket's gun, 2b, 1s, Energy bullet 10.
Legosi - 50, 15, -. Summoned upon killing rabbits. 2b, 1s.

The bosses:
Ekatebrina - 450, 10. Fall, Drowning. -. Taiga Crystal 5, 3s, 5b, 1z. Called by the coldest.
Monster with white eyes - 300, 15, fall. Warm biomes. Brinathor, 5c, 7b, 1z.
Darker - 450, 15, fall. Forests. Dark upgrde kit. 5c, 7b, 1z.

 

 

 

Nether:
Nightmare is a drop from Night mages, knights and the boss of the Night Queen. Tools are made of it.
Wither Bones - Drop from the Wither Skeletons. It can be processed in a craft window, pestle and mortar or grinder into a drying flour.

Mobs (life, damage, resistance to something (if any), appearance biomes, drop (b - bronze coin, c - silver, z-gold)):
Night Mage - 15, shoots. Fire. Appears in the Night Kingdom in Nether. Nightmare 3, 2s, 3b, moon flames.
Night Knight - 30, 5, Fire. Appears in the Night Kingdom in Nether. Night Sword, 2s, 3b.

The bosses:
Night Qween - 500, 10. Fire, fall. Summoned by Moon Flames on the altar of the Night Queen in a special structure in the nether. Nightmare 17, 4c, 5b, 1z, creates a portal at the place of death in Purgatorium.

Structures:
Kingdom of the Night - A structure where Mages and Knights of the Night are called, and the boss of the Night Qween is also called.

 

 

 

 

End:
Ores:
Silver.

Structures:
Damaged island.
Portal to Edem.

 

 

Comets:
A world consisting of flying islands. (!!! Put on Ditus shoes before teleporting, as there is a risk of falling into the void)
Made in pink and blue bright style. The portal can be found in the form of a building high in the sky.

Gold Dust - Drop from Golden Golems. Not yet used anywhere.
Comet Cabbage - a plant, when the fruit is eaten, the strength of the second level is given.

Ores:
Aerolite - falls from comet slimes in special structures. Tools are made of it.
Skylite - rarely appears in the comet stone. Tools are made of it.

Various swords and tools not from ores:
Feather knife - made from aerolite and stick of comets.
Axe of Evil - made from Skylite Axe and Dust of Evil. When they destroy the Tree of Comets, Ent Comet is called upon.

Mobs (life, damage, resistance to anything (if any), drop (b - bronze coin, c - silver, s-gold)):
Unicorn Comets - 100, 10, -. Doodlick, rainbow gun, 4s, 7b, 1z, Return Ticket.
Comet Slime - 140, 10, -. Minigathor, aerolite ingot, 4s, 7b, 1z, Return Ticket.
Comet Beetle - 170, 15, -. Rocket Launcher, 4c, 7b, 1z, Return Ticket, Dust of Evil 2.
Golden Golem - 150, 10, -. Gold dust 4, gold ingot, 2s, 4b, 1z, Return Ticket, Energy bullet 10.

The bosses:
Comet Ent - 1616, 15, -. Dust of Evil 7, Great Guardians Sword, Flamethrower, Red Shotgun, 6s, 9b, 3z, Return Ticket, Energy bullet 17, Luxtarr bullet 47. Called upon breaking the comet tree by axe of evil.

 

 

 

 

Purgatorium:
The dark dimension, with the remains of creatures of colossal size directly on the surface. Blood red sky. A portal to the dimension is generated after the death of the Queen of the Night boss.

Agate - Drop from Thin.
Phantom Soul - Drop from Purgatory Phantom.
Bloodstone - Drops from Purgatory Watcher. Tools are made of it.
Ancient Artifact - sold in one of the Purgatorium merchants. Summons a Fallen Titan.
Beast Upgrade Kit - Used to upgrade certain weapons. Drops from the Beast of Purgatory.
Eyebloom - a plant whose fruits give the effect of night vision.

Various swords and tools not from ores:
Glitch Spear - drops out of Fat.
Infernality - Improving a bloody sword using a bloody stone, phantom soul, and nightmares.
Arkenslan Shuriken - drops out of Smooce. 20 damage.

Mobs (life, damage, resistance to anything (if any), drop (b - bronze coin, c - silver, s-gold)):
Fat - 112, 12, -. Spiked armor, spear of glitch, Ticket Back, 5s, 7b, 1z.
Thin - 112, 12, -. Agate, Return Ticket, 5s, 7b, 1z.
Two-faced - 112, 6, -. Skull Crossbow, Return Ticket, 5c, 7b, 1z.
Purgatory Watcher - 100, 5, shoots. Bloodstone, Return Ticket, 5c, 7b, 1z.
Purgatory Beast - 130, 12, -. Beast Upgrade Kit, Return Ticket, 5s, 7b, 1z.
Purgatory Phantom - 120, 12, -. Phantom Soul, Return Ticket, 5s, 7b, 1z.

The bosses:
Smooce - 850, 9, -. 7s, 14b, 1z, Arkenslan shuriken, Return Ticket. The game does not appear yet.
The Fallen Titan - 1666, 12, -. Underground Greatsword, stone rifle, Return Ticket, 8c, 13b, 2z. Called by an Ancient Artifact.

 

 

 

 

Eden:
Paradise, sunny garden on the flying islands. (!!! Put on Ditus shoes before teleporting, as there is a risk of falling into the void)
Holy water - crafted from water and fairy dust. Throwing weapon.

Mobs (life, damage, resistance to anything (if any), drop (b - bronze coin, c - silver, s-gold)):
Sunlin - 120, 10. Fire, lightning, falling. Light staff, bacon 2, blades of the sun 4, Return Ticket, 4s, 7b, 1z.
Basking One - 120, 10. Fire, Arrows, lightning, fall. Subtropical ultrasound, Ticket back, 4s, 7b, 1z.
Sunbloom - 120, 10. Fire, arrows, fall, lightning. Fairy Dust, Return Ticket, 4c, 7b, 1z.
Sjinn - 130, 15. Fire, lightning, falls, potions. Djinn lamp, Return Ticket, 4s, 7b, 1z.
Lightduse - 130, 10. Fire, lightning, fall. Glow obese, Return Ticket, 4s, 7b, 1z.
Chaotic Elemental - 200, 10. Fire, Arrows, Drop, Cactus, Lightning, Potions. Chaotic entity, Return Ticket, 4s, 7b, 1z. Rare mob.
Paradise watcher - 110, 10. Fire, lightning, fall. Catalyst 3, ticket back, 4s, 7b, 1z.
Hephaestus Walker - 130, 16. Fire, arrows, fall, lightning. Mechasword, Return Ticket, 4s, 7b, 1z.
Messiah - 140, 10. Fire, lightning, fall, potions. Comlocation Staff, Return Ticket, 4s, 7b, 1z.

The bosses:
Djraghax - 1000, 10. Fire, arrows, lightning. Incredible staff, Return Ticket, 6s, 11b, 2z. Summoned by the DJraghax's Lamp (made from a djinn lamp and soulbones)
Eternal Dawn - 1200, 10. Fire, fall, lightning. The greatest sword, chainsaw, Return Ticket, 6s, 11b, 2z. Summoned using a chaotic entity.

 

 

 

Blocks:
Carved flisotuachewn block - made of six flisotuachewn plates.
Diorite, andesite, granite and sand dirt. Used for growing tea and chili peppers. Made from dirt and appropriate stone / sand.
The fertile soil is also suitable for growing chili peppers and tea. It is created from all the above soils, sludge and black soil.
Salt and death plains - salt is generated in mines as ore, and salt land in a special biome. Salt can be salted with meat and fish.
Sludge is soil generated in rivers and other bodies of water.
Mud is a block generated around the world. Slows down onset.
Inverted mud is a block created from mud and flisotuachewn, which accelerates on the offensive.
Red and blue lamp - lamps with animation.
Lamps made of iron, coal, water, darkham, diamond, emerald, flisotuachewn, gold, lapis lazuli, luxtarr, nightmare, quartz and redstone dust.
Djinn lamp - made from a djinn lamp (item) and a catalyst.
Nether reactor core.
Block of nether stars - for show-offs.
Bricks of Comets.
Moon Bricks.
Bricks of Hell.
Bloody Bricks.
Paradise bricks.
The bricks of Edem.

 

Other tools:
Bedrock tools - an axe, pickaxe and shovel are very fast, but quickly break. The hoe, on the contrary, serves a very long time (I think you cannot break it). There is no sword.
Chainsaw - used as an axe...the fastest axe.

Armor (at the end the defense is written in the order: helmet, chestplate, leggings and boots):
Luhsam armor - armor made of luxtarr and darkham. 4 8 7 3
Nightura Armor - Armor from nightmares and aquatura. 4 9 7 4
Sky armor - armor made of skylite and aerolite. 6 9 8 5
Thorn armor - drops only from Fat. 6 10 9 5
Bloody armor - armor of blood stone and nightmares. The chestplate imposes a fourth-level regeneration. 6 9 8 5
Nightingale armor - armor from nightmares and phantom souls. At the moment, the best armor. The cheatplate gives regeneration and strength of the fifth level and speed of the sixth level. 7 10 10 6
White gold armor - 4 8 8 4.

Boots:
Dirtus Boots - Defense 3. Create grass ground under the player. Useful when traveling to Comet or Eden. Shared from diamond boots and ground with grass.
Slippers - made of wool.
Rabbit slippers - made from slippers, rabbit skin and rabbit legs.

High-speed boots (the first are Valkyrie boots, and the rest are created by improving the previous ones):
Valkyrie boots - created from the Valkyrie ring and heavenly boots.
Quicksilver's boots.
Flash's Boots.
Accelerator's boots - starting with these boots, subsequent ones do not craft.
Makkrui's boots.
Land arsornist's boots - besides speed, set fire to the blocks below.
Adventurer’s boots - are made from the boots of the land arsonist (and vice versa), but do not set fire to the blocks. The speed is the same.

Great Swords:
Guardian Sword - Drops from Comet Ent. Deals more damage than it could.
Underground Sword - Drops from the Fallen Titan. May do more damage than it should. At the moment, the most powerful sword mod.
The greatest sword.

Staves and magic items:
Terraformation staff - destroys blocks and can get a bedrock. Bought from a merchant in the ordinary world.
Valkyrie Ring - created from aerolite ingots. Gives level 10 speed.
Pyrostaff - imposes fire resistance.
Light Staff - gives regeneration.
Glow obese - gives night vision.
Comlocation staff - teleports you to where you are looking, but if the block you are looking at beyond 100 blocks teleports you into the air.
Incredible staff - destroys mobs, but not all.
Sky staff - gives speed. She lodges at the merchants in Edem.

Ammunition:
Luxtarr bullet - made from Luxtarr.
Cannonball - Made from five darkham ingots.
Red Bullet - Made from red dust, flisotuachewn and iron.
Energy bullet - drops from the Halfwolders and Rusty Golems.
Rocket - made from dynamite and two darkham ingots.
Aerolite bullet - made from aerolite.
Skylite arrow - made of aerolite, stick of comets and flameflower petal.
Bloody arrow - is made of a bloody stone, phantom souls, a petal of a flameflower.
Crossbow bolt - made of stone and planks.

Guns (at the end of damage):
The ordinary world:
Rocket's gun - Drops out of the Halfworlders. Shoots energy bullets. 5
Brinathor - drops from a monster with white eyes. Fires luxtarr bullets. 10
Darkinathor - Improving the Brinathor with a dark kit. Fires luxtarr bullets. 15
Comets:
Doodlick - Drops from comet unicorns that appear in special buildings. Fires aerolite bullets. 12
Rainbow Gun - Drops from the unicorns of comets that appear in special buildings. Fires luxtarr bullets. 12
Good Gun - Sold by comet traders. It shoots a cannonball. 19
Minigathor - falls from the slimes of comets. Fires luxtarr bullets. 15
Rocket Launcher - drops from comet beetles. Fires rockets. fifteen
Storm Bow - Sold by comet traders. It shoots with skylite arrows. 22
Violet Shotgun - Sold by Comet Merchants. Fires luxtarr bullets. 19
Gigathor - drops from Comet Ent. Shoots energy bullets. 18
Flamethrower - drops from Comet Ent. Fires a luxtarr bullet. Ignites. 28
Red Shotgun - Drops from Comet Ent. Shoots red bullets. 12
Purgatorium:
Skull Crossbow - Drops from Two-Faced. Fires crossbow bolts. 15
Predatory Bow - Sold by Purgatorium Merchants. It shoots bloody arrows. 24
Stone Rifle - Drops from Fallen Titan. Fires luxtarr bullets. 20
Predatoryminigathor - improvement of the minigathor with the help of an beast upgrade kit. Fires luxtarr bullets. 18
Bow with arterial string - made from three bloody stones and a shadow onion. It shoots with bloody arrows. 17
Crimson Blaster - Made from four bloody stones and one phantom soul. Shoots energy bullets. 16
Shadow bow - made of three bloody stones and three phantom souls. It shoots with bloody arrows. 17
Red Lightning - Sold by Purgatorium Merchants. It shoots with bloody arrows. It is the strongest ranged weapon at the moment. 39
Edem:
Subtropical uzi - drops out of Basking One. Fires luxtarr bullets. 12
Bow of justice - sold by traders in Edem, shoots the arrow of Edem. 17

 

Biomes:
Black sails - a biome consisting of black sails (it is also made from ordinary dirt and flint dust), a source of tea.
Dead Plains - completely composed of salty land, where nothing grows.
Volcanic valley is a biome consisting of basalt and volcanoes. Under the ground you can find uranium ore, and in the volcanoes themselves many other various ores.

 

Food:
Salted meat (all kinds) and fish.
Meat feast - combine all kinds of salted meat and fish in a bowl and get it.
A mug of water.
A mug of milk.
A mug of tea - a mug of water + tea leaves.
Mug of Mushroom Tea - a mug of tea + mushrooms.
Burrito - made from meat, chili and bread.

 

 

Plants:
Flameflower - sometimes growing on a stone in the ordinary world. Most often in the mountains. It is grown only on stone. Fertilized with wither bone meal.
Tea - seeds fall from grass in black soil. Grown on black sail, fertile soil, stone / sandy soils or silt.
Chili pepper - A plant that, when consumed, will have a chili effect on you. Grown on chernozem, fertile soil, stone / sandy soils or silt. Not yet mined.

 

 

The mechanisms:
Alchemical Furnace: Allows you to convert a rusty ingot into iron, six coals into graphite, and six graphite into diamond (based on the fact that coal and diamond are made of the same molecules, but with a different structure. 1 Diamond = 36 coal)
Pestle and mortar - a block, when pressed with certain objects, another object is obtained. Flint - flint dust 2, wither bone - wither bone meal 5, salt (block) - salt 6, luminous stone - luminous dust 6, gravel - flint, bone - bone meal 5, bone block - bone meal 11.
Crusher is an automated unit with coal and pestle and mortar functions.
